productDisplayName: Carrera Men Dial steel finish strap Silver Watches
description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as masters in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic drivers& rsquo and racers& rsquo watch models and perfect for urban wear. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 15 mm Dial shape: Octagon Stainless steel case Steel strap with black patching and brand inscription on the inner side for enhanced durability, comfort and style Tang clasp with brand inscription Fixed stainless steel bezel for added durability and style Black busy dial with metallic numbers in metallic hands Seconds hands in red Three sub dials with three stop watches Chronograph for easy reading of time Metallic crown to adjust time/date/day Water resistant at 100 meters, making it suitable for scuba diving
